name: legal-ops-toolkit
description: Legal operations plugin bundling jurisdiction skills, contract review agents, and confidentiality hooks for law firm workflows.
author: Trazomo

skills.name: jurisdiction-ny
skills.description: New York legal requirements, statutes of limitation, and citation conventions

agents.name: contract-reviewer
agents.description: Extract key terms and risk-rate contract provisions

agents.name: research-assistant
agents.description: Verify legal claims and find supporting authority

agents.name: memo-drafter
agents.description: Synthesize analysis into a client-ready memorandum

hooks.description: Block writes containing PII or privilege markers
Verify Bluebook citation format in written documents
